nasb.text: or if a man touches any teeming things by which he is made unclean, or any man by whom he is made unclean, whatever his uncleanness;

esv.text: and whoever touches a swarming thing by which he may be made unclean or a person from whom he may take uncleanness, whatever his uncleanness may be—

cnv.text: 或是觸摸了任何使他玷污的爬蟲，或是摸了使他成為不潔淨的人，

ccb.text: 或碰到不洁净的爬虫，或碰到不洁净的人，
